title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.311 - License collector, St. Louis City, qualifications — residence requirement, violation, forfeiture of office
text:
82.311.  License collector, St. Louis City, qualifications — residence requirement, violation, forfeiture of office. — 1.  No person shall be elected or appointed to the office of license collector in any city not within a county who shall not have been a qualified voter of such city for one year next preceding his election or appointment.
  2.  Any license collector of any city not within a county who removes his residence from such city shall forfeit such office.
(L. 1990 S.B. 862 § 2)
